docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF BRENETH CHASE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WENDY STROUD IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
